tools.name: Level3Support Request Form
tools.description: Legacy request form for Support, RCA, Training and other Level3Support services.

tools.name: Technical Documentation Database
tools.description: Legacy searchable database of technical documents, manuals, and troubleshooting guides.

tools.name: Training Catalog
tools.description: Legacy list of available training courses and resources provided by Level3Support.

tools.name: Training Evaluation Form
tools.description: Legacy training evaluation form (English / Spanish).

tools.name: ABB REJ603 Relay Configuration Tool
tools.description: Used to configure ABB REJ603 protection relays. (OEM Specific - ABB)

tools.name: SG1+x Parameter Comparison Tool
tools.description: Compare Sungrow SG1+x inverter parameters side by side. (OEM Specific - Sungrow)

tools.name: UMCG Data Analysis Tool
tools.description: Used to analyze data logs downloaded from Sungrow inverters. (OEM Specific - Sungrow)

tools.name: PDP Module Fault Code Interpreter
tools.description: Decodes raw diagnostic codes and status faults for Sungrow inverters, providing immediate troubleshooting guides and failure root causes for technicians in the field. (OEM Specific - Sungrow)

tools.name: PV String Sizer & VOC Calculator
tools.description: Calculate PV string voltage at different temperatures and help determine minimum/maximum modules per string based on inverter MPPT and maximum DC voltage constraints.

tools.name: BESS Cable Sizing Calculator
tools.description: Provide a field-use cable sizing estimate for BESS DC and AC auxiliary circuits using manual ampacity and derating inputs.

tools.name: Torque Spec Finder & Connection Calculator
tools.description: Searchable torque specification reference tool for solar array and battery rack connections with target bolt pre-loads calculator.
tools.notes: Merged standard torque specification finder with mechanical bolt tension calculator.

tools.name: PV Insulation Resistance (Megger) Tester
tools.description: Record PV insulation resistance test results and provide preliminary pass/fail based on user-entered acceptance criteria.

tools.name: BESS Cell Voltage Imbalance Calculator
tools.description: Analyze cell/module voltage spread across BESS modules, racks, strings, or clusters to identify imbalance conditions.

tools.name: Transformer Turns Ratio (TTR) Form
tools.description: Record transformer turns ratio test results and calculate ratio error by phase and tap position.

tools.name: LOTO Verification Checklist
tools.description: Create a field checklist to verify lockout/tagout preparation, isolation points, zero-energy verification, and restoration readiness.

tools.name: Arc Flash Boundary Calculator
tools.description: Provide a safe field reference/planning aid for arc flash boundary documentation using user-provided incident energy and/or boundary values from an approved arc flash study.

tools.name: Daily Commissioning Progress Report
tools.description: Generate a structured daily commissioning progress report for PV/BESS field work.

tools.name: String Current Imbalance Calculator
tools.description: Compare solar string currents against the average and flag abnormal strings above a configurable deviation threshold.

tools.name: DC Voltage Sanity Check Tool
tools.description: Check if measured string voltage matches expected module count and temperature-corrected Voc or Vmp values.

tools.name: Inverter Start-Up Checklist
tools.description: Structured digital commissioning checklist covering visual inspection, DC/AC checks, grounding, comms, firmware, and first energization.

tools.name: IV Curve Test Result Log
tools.description: Record and categorize IV curve test results consistently across field teams. Supports defect classification and CSV export.
tools.notes: Agent 3 — Multi-record log with status summary.

tools.name: Firmware Version Tracker
tools.description: Track firmware versions across inverters, dataloggers, routers, and other field equipment. Flags devices requiring updates.

tools.name: Insulation Resistance Test Form
tools.description: Record insulation resistance test results for PV, BESS, AC, DC, and transformer circuits.

tools.name: Transformer Test Results Form
tools.description: Create a structured transformer test report covering nameplate, visual, IR, winding resistance, turns ratio, vector group, and tap changer.

tools.name: Grounding Continuity Test Form
tools.description: Record grounding and bonding continuity tests with multiple points.
tools.notes: Agent 5 — Sample max allowed resistance 0.5 Ω.

tools.name: CT/PT Ratio Verification Tool
tools.description: Verify CT and PT ratios against measured values and relay configuration.

tools.name: Relay Settings Checklist
tools.description: Checklist to confirm relay settings were loaded and verified.

tools.name: PV Performance Ratio Calculator
tools.description: Determine utility-scale solar PV system Performance Ratio (PR) with optional temperature correction.

tools.name: Cable Ampacity / Max Current Calculator
tools.description: Estimate corrected cable ampacity based on insulation ratings, ambient temp, and bundling factors.

tools.name: Voltage Drop Calculator
tools.description: Calculate voltage drop and power loss for DC, single-phase AC, and three-phase AC circuits.

tools.name: BESS Availability Calculator
tools.description: Calculate simple and adjusted availability for utility-scale battery systems over reporting periods.

tools.name: HVAC Delta-T Calculator
tools.description: Sanity check BESS enclosure HVAC cooling and heating performance using supply, return, and ambient readings.

tools.name: Weather Correction Calculator for PV Testing
tools.description: Translate open-air PV power measurements to Standard Test Conditions (STC) using real-time irradiance and temp.

tools.name: SCADA Tag QA/QC Checklist
tools.description: Verify signal list scaling, remote controls, HMI displays, and historian logging for communications handovers.

tools.name: MODBUS Register Decoder
tools.description: Decode raw decimal/hex MODBUS registers into engineering values including 16/32-bit types and 32-bit floats.

tools.name: Alarm / Fault Event Timeline Builder
tools.description: Build chronological alarm and fault timelines to analyze cascading faults, repeated codes, and trigger times.

tools.name: Commissioning Punchlist Builder
tools.description: Create, manage, and filter field punchlist items for PV/BESS commissioning and close-out.

tools.name: Customer Site Visit Report Generator
tools.description: Generate a structured, professional, customer-facing field service site visit report.

tools.name: RCA Template Builder
tools.description: Structured Root Cause Analysis (RCA) report builder for solar and battery plant incidents.

tools.name: Safety Pre-Task Plan / JHA Form
tools.description: Standardized Job Hazard Analysis (JHA) and safety planning form to conduct before field tasks.

tools.name: LOTO Checklist Generator
tools.description: Lockout/Tagout energy isolation planning and zero-energy verification checklist aid.

tools.name: Technical Documentation / Reference Search Tool
tools.description: Find and view active service bulletins, commissioning manuals, training resources, and datasheets.

tools.name: Inverter Clipping / Curtailment Check Tool
tools.description: Help determine whether reduced inverter output is consistent with inverter clipping, PPC curtailment, export limit, or real underperformance.

tools.name: Irradiance Sensor Cross-Check Tool
tools.description: Compare irradiance sensors, reference cells, and nearby inverter behavior to detect dirty, misaligned, drifting, or unreliable measurements.

tools.name: Tracker Angle / Backtracking QA Checklist
tools.description: Validate tracker angle behavior, backtracking, mechanical alignment, and wind stow during commissioning or troubleshooting.

tools.name: Corrective Action Tracker / CAPA Log
tools.description: Track corrective and preventive actions from punchlists, RCAs, inspections, HSE forms, and commissioning findings.

tools.name: Inverter Derating Cause Analyzer
tools.description: Identify whether an inverter is limiting power due to temperature, grid voltage, frequency, reactive power, or protection.

tools.name: Interactive Power Triangle Tool
tools.description: Interactive visual tool showing the relationship between active power P, reactive power Q, apparent power S, power factor, and phase angle.

tools.name: Inverter Capability Curve Check
tools.description: Check whether a requested active/reactive power operating point is within inverter apparent power limits.

tools.name: Grid Event Voltage/Frequency Excursion Log
tools.description: Log grid voltage/frequency excursions, calculate deviations, and create structured RCA-ready event timelines.

tools.name: Battery SOC Imbalance Analyzer
tools.description: Analyze SOC spread and balancing status across battery racks, strings, containers, or clusters.

tools.name: Battery Temperature Spread Analyzer
tools.description: Analyze battery temperature variation across racks, modules, or clusters to detect HVAC or fan issues.

tools.name: Number Base Converter
tools.description: Convert values between binary, decimal, hex, and octal with bit-width, byte-order swaps, and manual register bit viewer.

tools.name: Soiling Loss Estimator
tools.description: Estimate PV system energy loss due to soiling based on site conditions.

tools.name: Clean vs. Soiled String Comparison Tool
tools.description: Compare electrical output between clean and soiled strings to quantify performance impact.

tools.name: Cleaning ROI Calculator
tools.description: Calculate the return on investment for PV array cleaning based on performance gain vs. cleaning costs.

tools.name: Lost Energy from Soiling Calculator
tools.description: Quantify total lost energy (kWh) attributed to soiling over a specific time period.

tools.name: Soiling Customer Report Generator
tools.description: Generate a customer-facing report detailing soiling impacts and recommended cleaning actions.

tools.name: Fuse Continuous Current & Temperature Derating Calculator
tools.description: Calculate derated continuous current limits and determine appropriate fuse ratings based on ambient temperature and custom derating factors.
